name: OMDb / IMDb Metadata
description: Fetches movie and series metadata directly from the OMDb API (Open Movie Database), which is powered by IMDb data. Returns IMDb ratings, awards, cast, and detailed plot info.
author: Mythra Team

configSchema.label: Poster image size
configSchema.description: OMDb returns a single poster URL — this is passed as-is.

configSchema.label: Search cache TTL (minutes)
configSchema.description: How long search results are cached. Default: 60.

configSchema.label: Detail cache TTL (hours)
configSchema.description: How long full movie details are cached. Default: 24.
